title: HR Situational Judgment Test: Evidence-Based HR Decision-Making
description: Exploratory online HR Situational Judgment Test (27 scenarios). Welcome: business students (MNGT 425 / MNGT 502 course assignment) and working employees interested in management topics. Optional ratings/Skip/notes. No deception. Aggregate findings may be shared separately. ~45–60 min.
consent_text: By participating, you agree to complete the HR SJT (optional ratings; skip allowed; optional decision notes), allow de-identified ratings (opaque session ID; no PRAMS ID) to be used for exploratory research, and understand participation is voluntary. Optional emails for lab updates are collected only on a separate form. Contact Dr. Christopher Castille with questions.
